articles.title_en: How drones came to decide the war in Ukraine, and why no army has found the weapon that stops them
articles.lead_en: Ukrainian strikes on Russian oil refineries and transport well behind the front lines — a hundred kilometers away or more — have forced Russia’s Defense Ministry to launch an overhaul of the country’s air defenses. Defense Minister Andrei Belousov has promised that by November, Russia will complete a new integrated, layered air defense system capable of countering drones across the country’s entire territory, from the front lines to the deep rear.
articles.title_raw: How drones came to decide the war in Ukraine, and why no army has found the weapon that stops them
articles.lead_raw: Ukrainian strikes on Russian oil refineries and transport well behind the front lines — a hundred kilometers away or more — have forced Russia’s Defense Ministry to launch an overhaul of the country’s air defenses. Defense Minister Andrei Belousov has promised that by November, Russia will complete a new integrated, layered air defense system capable of countering drones across the country’s entire territory, from the front lines to the deep rear.

articles.title_en: A 12-year-old’s antiwar drawing sent her father to Russian prison. Three years later, they’re starting over in Paris after a stalled bid for asylum in Germany.
articles.lead_en: In the fall of 2024, Alexei Moskalev — released from prison after being convicted of “discrediting” the Russian military — reunited with his 14-year-old daughter, Masha, and the two moved from Russia to Armenia. There, they applied for a German humanitarian visa.

articles.lead_raw: Российские бойцы также поразили до 480 вражеских военнослужащих, заявил офицер группировки Дмитрий Миськов

articles.title_en: The Russian Foreign Ministry learned about the appearance of new Ukrainian-made UAVs in Africa
articles.lead_en: Military advisers from Ukraine are present in the northern border area in Mali, said Anatoly Bashkin, director of the Department of African States
articles.title_raw: МИД РФ узнал о появлении в Африке новых БПЛА украинского производства
articles.lead_raw: Военные советники с Украины присутствуют на территории северного приграничья в Мали, сообщил директор департамента государств Африки Анатолий Башкин

articles.title_en: The Legion commander spoke about the advantage of the Russian Armed Forces in the Slavic direction in UAVs
articles.lead_en: The military officer noted that the flight range of Russian drones is twice that of Ukrainian Armed Forces drones.
articles.title_raw: Командир Легион рассказал о преимуществе ВС РФ на славянском направлении в БПЛА
articles.lead_raw: Военный отметил, что дальность полетов российских беспилотников в два раза превышает этот показатель у дронов ВСУ

articles.title_en: The Russian National Library launches the resource "Wartime Requests"
articles.lead_en: It will display documents compiled by specialists during the Great Patriotic War.
articles.title_raw: Российская национальная библиотека запускает ресурс "Запросы военного времени"
articles.lead_raw: На нем разместят документы, составленные специалистами во время Великой Отечественной войны

articles.title_en: Kasperskaya believes that AI in Russia should work for military purposes
articles.lead_en: The President of InfoWatch called artificial intelligence a dual-use technology
articles.title_raw: Касперская считает, что ИИ в России должен работать на военные цели
articles.lead_raw: Президент компании InfoWatch назвала искусственный интеллект технологией двойного назначения

articles.title_en: Fighter Pakhalin destroyed the Ukrainian Armed Forces reconnaissance point with "Lightning"
articles.lead_en: The actions of the corporal significantly made it difficult for the enemy to quickly obtain data on the movements of the Russian Armed Forces, the Ministry of Defense noted.
articles.title_raw: Боец Пахалин "Молнией" уничтожил пункт разведки ВСУ
articles.lead_raw: Действия ефрейтора существенно затруднили противнику возможность оперативно получать данные о передвижении ВС РФ, отметили в Минобороны

articles.title_en: Military operation in Ukraine. Online
articles.lead_en: The Russian Armed Forces, using the Geranium-4 Seeker, hit a bulk carrier in the outer roadstead of the port of Odessa, the Ministry of Defense reported.
articles.title_raw: Военная операция на Украине. Онлайн
articles.lead_raw: ВС РФ с помощью "Герань-4 сикер" ударили по судну типа балкер на внешнем рейде порта Одесса, сообщили в Минобороны
